# GitHub Copilot Instructions

See `AGENTS.md` for shared project guidance.

When working in this repository:

- answer in Japanese unless asked otherwise
- prefer existing Files patterns over generic framework patterns
- use `docs/ai/codebase-overview.md` for repository structure and project ownership
- use `docs/ai/architecture-direction.md` for long-term direction on AOT, trimming, UI composition, native interop, controls, and storage
- prefer MVVM for app feature work
